attributes.action: Ban homework for high school in the uk!
attributes.additional_details: To ban it for all high schools in the uk. If schools can’t teach it why let the students teach them selves?
attributes.background: I want the uk parliament to ban all homework. This is because it’s the students time NOT the schools time and people spend 1 hour a day on homework that’s a whole nother day.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Ban homework in all schools
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/742337
